mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, form_key, form_data_key, form_conf_json, form_data_json, app_key

mapper.update:
update t_upone_ru_form
gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER},
form_key = #{formKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
form_data_key = #{formDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
form_conf_json = #{formConfJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
form_data_json = #{formDataJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_upone_ru_form set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, form_key = #{formKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, form_data_key = #{formDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, form_conf_json = #{formConfJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, form_data_json = #{formDataJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_upone_ru_form (gmt_create, gmt_modified, `status`, flags, form_key, form_data_key, form_conf_json, form_data_json, app_key) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.formKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.formDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.formConfJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.formDataJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
